concept: Could you design a fighting game where combatants manipulate time instead of just health bars? Fighters can age opponents, rewind damage, accelerate or slow movements, or trap enemies in time loops. Each character represents a different temporal philosophy - one preserves the timeline, another seeks to create paradoxes, a third tries to accelerate entropy. The single-player story mode explores a crisis at the end of time, where the last remaining beings contest the right to determine what happens when the universe begins again.
